name: World Finance
description_short: World Finance Arlington, Texas — World Finance offers personal installment loans, tax preparation, and refund advances at a Memphis branch location with...
description_long:
World Finance operates a physical branch location in Memphis, Tennessee, specializing in personal installment loans and related financial services. The company has been established in the consumer finance space and maintains a local presence focused on serving the Memphis community.

The company offers personal installment loans as their primary product, along with supplementary services including credit-building loans, tax preparation, refund advance loans, and roadside assistance. They position themselves as a relationship-based lender, emphasizing one-on-one consultations with branch staff to match customers with appropriate loan solutions based on individual financial situations and budgets.

World Finance distinguishes itself through its local branch model and personalized service approach. The Memphis location operates Monday through Friday with extended evening hours (until 5:30 PM), is managed by a named branch manager (Rutherford Brannon), and actively serves the Spanish-speaking community. The company provides educational blog content on loan management, refinancing, and credit building, suggesting a focus on financial literacy alongside lending.

World Finance appears to be a traditional installment lender with community-focused operations. However, the website provides limited detail on APR ranges, specific loan amounts, approval criteria, or how their rates compare to market alternatives. Customers considering this lender should request detailed cost disclosures before applying, as terms and conditions are not transparently displayed on the public-facing website.
address: 2544 E Abram St Suite 105, Arlington, TX 76010

company_info.headquarters: 2544 E Abram St Suite 105, Arlington, TX 76010

pros: Physical branch location in Memphis with extended weekday hours (9 AM–5:30 PM) for in-person service
Named branch manager and local team committed to one-on-one customer consultations
Offers multiple product types including credit-building loans and tax preparation services in addition to personal loans
Educational blog content covering loan management, refinancing, and credit-building strategies
Roadside assistance included as an ancillary service
Staff described as knowledgeable and responsive in customer reviews
cons: APR rates, loan amounts, and eligibility criteria not disclosed on website—requires branch contact for pricing
Limited online application process; primarily encourages in-person or phone consultation
Saturday hours require calling branch rather than posted schedule; Sunday closed
Customer reviews present but sparse; only 3 partial reviews visible on website
No information on typical approval timelines or funding speed compared to online lenders
best_for: Consumers who prefer in-person service and relationship-based lending decisions
Memphis-area residents seeking personal loans with credit-building components
Spanish-speaking borrowers requiring bilingual financial services and consultation
diagnosis: World Finance is best for Memphis-area borrowers who value face-to-face service and personalized lending consultations over online convenience. The primary caveat is that all pricing, rates, and specific terms must be obtained by calling or visiting the branch, as the website withholds this critical information needed for true cost comparison with competitors.
